summary: Classified all five open PRs independently as non-mutating keep actions. The shard has no shared canonical, no hydrated security-sensitive items, and no safe close/merge/fix path under this job's permissions; each PR remains open pending proof or maintainer review.

actions.reason: Open focused PR in a distinct area with failed proof/checks and no hydrated canonical duplicate; keep open as independent inventory item.
Open focused PR with a distinct scope and no hydrated duplicate/canonical; keep open for proof and normal maintainer review.
Open focused UI PR with missing real behavior proof and no hydrated duplicate/canonical; keep as independent.
Open useful but nontrivial MCP availability PR with failed proof and no shared canonical; keep open independently.
Open focused session-store PR with failed proof/checks and no hydrated duplicate/canonical; keep as independent.
